The cheers from the crowd are deafening here at the
Twinkle Series Arima Kinen!

Expectations are high as our sixteen Umamusume dash
past the stands! Which one will take the Arima Kinen
crown?

All eyes are on number eight, Oguri Cap! Today marks her
last run in the Twinkle Series!

Although nicknamed "Beast," Oguri hasn't been quite
herself on the track as of late.

Will Oguri bring back her overwhelming strength and take
first? Can she do it?!
Oguri! Keep up that pace!

Oh, don't just stand there and gawk! You should be
cheering for our ace as well! It's her last race!

Time and time again, she's shown the world her blistering
speed.
I just know she can do it!

I cannot bear to remain a mere spectator. I must get
closer...
I must witness her victory up close!

As the runners approach the third corner, those in the back
are closing in! From here on, it's a battle of endurance!
Oguri! Keep pushing!
Fight on, Oguri!
I won't let you down...
Time to finish this!

Oguri is catching up! Oguri advances! She pushes ahead
going around the fourth corner!
Haaa!

She takes the lead in the homestretch! But the competition
trails closely!
Only 200 meters remain until the finish line!
Will Oguri Cap pull off a miracle for her last run?
